issues.description: Report query does not filter by current user's organization, causing cross-tenant data exposure.
issues.impact: Any authenticated tenant user can view reports from other organizations.

issues.description: Organization api_key/webhook_secret and PaymentCard details are stored in plaintext.
issues.impact: Database compromise directly leaks secrets and payment data.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: id_card = encrypt_field(id_card); phone = encrypt_field(phone); bank_account = mask_value(bank_account)

issues.description: Only global authentication is checked; object-level organization ownership is not validated.
issues.impact: Users can access resources outside their tenant boundary.

issues.description: Analytics result with report data is cached without expiration.
issues.impact: Sensitive report data may persist indefinitely in cache.

issues.description: Export endpoint has no authorization check and exports all tenant reports.
issues.impact: Unauthorized parties can download sensitive cross-tenant data.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: if not request.user.is_staff: return JsonResponse({'error':'forbidden'}, status=403); export_qs = qs.filter(org=request.user.org).values('id','name')

issues.description: Cache key misses organization_id prefix, enabling cache collisions between tenants.
issues.impact: One tenant may read cached analytics belonging to another tenant.

issues.description: Analytics logs include report IDs that should not be exposed in routine logs.
issues.impact: Logs can leak internal identifiers and facilitate unauthorized enumeration.
issues.code_snippet: logger.info("analytics report ids: %s", [item["id"] for item in analytics])
